description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a rich, dark brown finish and a smooth, polished surface. The tabletop is thick and solid, supported by four slender, tapered legs made of metal with a dark, almost black color. The front of the table features a wide, open shelf running the length of the table, flanked by two smaller open cubby spaces on either side, providing storage or display options. The sides and back of the table are plain, with no additional features or openings. The overall design is modern and minimalist, with clean lines and a functional aesthetic. The table's construction suggests durability and stability, making it suitable for both residential and commercial urban environments.
description: A modern rectangular wooden table with a thick top, open front shelf, and slender dark metal legs. It features a rich brown finish and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open shelf and two side cubbies beneath the tabletop, with all four legs visible.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the solid wood side panel and two metal legs, with no visible openings or features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, uninterrupted wooden panel and all four legs, with no shelves or cubbies visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the solid wood side and two metal legs.
